description: console.log of a user-defined method whose name collides with a builtin boolean method (test/has/delete/includes/startsWith/endsWith) prints the actual return value, not a boolean. isBooleanExpression is now gated by receiver type; real RegExp/Array/String/Map/Set boolean methods still render as booleans.

expect.stdout:
42 has:x 99 SW
user-test
true true true
true false
